g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of queries can the campus agent handle?')
sendPrompt('What NLP preprocessing is done on the user input?')
sendPrompt('How does the intent classifier work?')
sendPrompt('What does the events router do?')
sendPrompt('What does the facilities router do?')
sendPrompt('What does the bookings router do?')

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the context builder do with retrieved data?')

Solid arrow = normal flow Dashed arrow = cancel / loop-back
Right column only activates when a booking action is confirmed
